title: Luke Thomas (footballer, born 1999)
extract:
Luke Gerald Michael Thomas (born 19 February 1999) is an English professional footballer who plays as winger for EFL League Two club Bristol Rovers. He will become a free agent on 30 June 2026.
Thomas began his career with Cheltenham Town, before later playing for Derby County and Barnsley. He has also featured on loan for Gloucester City, Coventry City and Ipswich Town.
